jira.notes: Timeline rows and dependency_flow are canonical for WM-Outcome-Map.html; edit this file first, then refresh #wm-outcomes-fallback in the HTML when edge copy or layout changes. Populate capability_issue_key and jira_epic_key per outcome when WM-WBS.md §9 Jira mapping is finalized (mirror PA/pa-outcomes.json). Optional dependency_edges[]: same model as PA when WM uses rich dep tooltips.

outcomes.title: Current State Discovery Complete
outcomes.detail: COMPLETE. Discovery sessions, workflow mapping, 360 case evaluation (559 open cases), current state assessment. Foundation for everything that follows.

outcomes.title: Operating Model & Process Design
outcomes.detail: COMPLETE. Highest-leverage outcome. Workflow states, work categories, mixed pipeline handling, side-door capture, triage ceremony, WIP limits, capacity allocation, operating agreement.

outcomes.title: Tool Selected & System Configured
outcomes.detail: Fit-to-process tool evaluation against operating agreement requirements. Board configured to match agreed workflow. No over-configuration.

outcomes.title: Existing Queue Dispositioned
outcomes.detail: 559 open 360 cases reviewed: still relevant (migrate), closeable (close), needs investigation (triage). Curated backlog, not bulk migration.

outcomes.title: Initial Adoption Validated
outcomes.detail: Training wheels phase. One category (customer env config). Break-fix tagging + side-door capture from day one. Triage twice weekly. 4-week validation, max 2 cycles.

outcomes.title: Full Category Coverage & Reactive Visibility
outcomes.detail: Expand to all work categories. PagerDuty integration for reactive work. Commitment tiers. Triage cadence evaluation. 4-week validation, max 2 cycles.

outcomes.title: Board Accuracy Validated
outcomes.detail: Trust gate. Board freshness 90%+ sustained 3 consecutive weeks. No shadow spreadsheets. Stale item detection. Max 3 validation cycles. Extends ~1 week past end-of-May.

outcomes.title: Flow Metrics & Scorecard Operational
outcomes.detail: Can begin design during WM-OC-06 (should dep on WM-OC-07). Cycle time, throughput, queue depth. Reference estimates. Scorecard integration (Workstream D).

outcomes.title: Prioritization Drives Execution
outcomes.detail: Capstone. System governs, not just informs. Priority changes reflected in team behavior. Side-door ratio declining. Flow retrospective process established. Extends ~3 weeks past end-of-May.
